description: Pre-built stat cards, sparklines, bar/line/donut charts, and progress rings — all pure SVG, no Chart.js or external lib. Drop in HTML + a tiny render helper. Lets the model add data-viz without dragging in a 200KB charting library or hallucinating Chart.js APIs.

sparkline.purpose: Inline trend line — pair with stat card

colorPalette.comment: Tailwind 500-tier — high contrast, accessible. Use first 4 for most dashboards; add 5-6 only if more series. Pair with var(--accent) override for branded apps.

typography.statValue: 32px / 700 / tabular-nums — the headline number on stat cards
typography.statLabel: 13px / 500 / uppercase / letter-spacing 0.5px — context for the value
typography.tooltip: 12px / 500 — hover details if you add interaction

license: Original SVG patterns, ISC-equivalent. No third-party assets.
